title: Obsidian cancels Avowed sequel and develops new Fallout after Xbox layoffs
summary: The studio responsible for Fallout: New Vegas abandons Avowed 2 to focus on the post-apocalyptic franchise, according to multiple reports.

title: Former Marathon director settles million-dollar lawsuit against Sony and Bungie for wrongful termination
summary: Christopher Barrett reaches settlement in the $200 million case after being fired for alleged misconduct.

title: Xbox layoffs leave id Software diminished and without independent development capacity
summary: The studio behind Doom and Quake loses projects like a new Perfect Dark and a John Wick-style game, and now functions solely as support.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is the highest-rated in the series since the original
summary: The remake receives excellent reviews and becomes the best-rated Assassin's Creed game in over a decade, and is also compatible with Steam Deck.

title: Sony faces harsh criticism for its plan to eliminate physical PlayStation discs by 2028
summary: More than 220,000 players sign a petition against the decision, while experts warn of the impact on retail.

title: Persona 4 Revival confirms significant changes to its characters, including removal of homophobic content
summary: Atlus adjusts Yosuke's scenes and other elements to modernize the game, according to its producers.

title: Palworld nears version 1.0 without price increase and with player record
summary: Pocketpair maintains the $29.99 price while the survival game reaches milestones in sales and concurrent players.

title: Subnautica 2 reaches 5 million copies and releases Adaptive Measures update
summary: The ocean survival game adds stuns and Biomods in its first major content update since early access launch.

title: Fallout series earns 10 Emmy nominations for its second season, but actors are left out
summary: Despite surpassing the previous season in number of nominations, none of the main actors received nominations.

title: The Crew Motorfest will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 on October 8
summary: Ubisoft confirms that the open-world racing game will be available on Nintendo's new console this fall.

title: MindsEye workers protest against their studio for hosting a luxury event amid layoffs
summary: Employees of Build a Rocket Boy criticize the organization of an all-expenses-paid fan event amid multiple layoffs.

title: Vampirium 1997 announced, an immersive simulator with Dracula as King of England
summary: Bithell Games presents a stealth and vampire game where the player is an assassin serving the vampire monarch, with an Early Access launch.

title: Bethesda layoffs threaten to further delay The Elder Scrolls 6
summary: Studio employees warn that the departure of key staff will have a cascading effect on the prolonged development of the RPG.

title: Dune 3 trailer reveals unsettling character that Villeneuve hid for four years
summary: The third installment of the sci-fi saga shows a disturbing figure that promises to be key to the story.

title: Love and Deepspace permanently loses its new love interest due to Chinese government intervention
summary: The werewolf character disappears from the game after regulatory pressure, according to authorities.

title: Buckshot Roulette launches unexpectedly on Xbox Game Pass
summary: The successful horror and Russian roulette game is now available for Xbox Series and Xbox One without prior notice.

title: Bernie Sanders slams Microsoft over Xbox layoffs while company posts record profits
summary: The US senator denounces that Microsoft laid off 3,200 employees despite generating $101 billion in profits.

title: Bethesda forces its employees to remove a memorial in honor of laid-off colleagues
summary: The internal union denounces that management ordered the removal of a tribute to workers affected by cuts.

title: Demo of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book now available on Nintendo Switch 2
summary: Players can try the new Yoshi adventure before its official launch.

title: Pokémon Legends: Z-A details season 14 and new aerial battle rules
summary: Season 14 of the game brings a special ruleset that takes battles to the sky, according to polygon and nintendolife.
